ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard (e.g., UK, US, IT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the size standard is used */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the size standard is used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., Men's, Women's, Children's) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of clothing (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "from_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source size standard */,
  "to_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target size standard */,
  "from_size" TEXT /* Size in the source standard */,
  "to_size" TEXT /* Size in the target standard */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate for the size conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_to_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_from_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., Men's, Women's) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the clothing item (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart applicable for the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing item */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity currently in stock */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the item is expected to be restocked */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Warehouse location where the item is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer providing feedback */,
  "size_fitted" TEXT /* Size fitted by the customer */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Satisfaction rating (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions from the customer */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, product manager, customer service) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., sales, marketing, logistics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name or type of the report */,
  "generated_on" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., sales, inventory, customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_fits" (
  "fit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., Regular, Slim, Loose) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fit */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation for the fit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_fits_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_info" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_info" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_info_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_info ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES order_info ("order_id")
)
